stemHtml: IFR in IMC, comm failure. After maintaining speed/level for the required time, you should...

options.a: Divert to the nearest suitable aerodrome along the route.
options.b: Proceed to a navaid serving an alternate aerodrome.
options.c: Proceed per the flight plan to the destination navaid then hold.
options.d: Proceed per the flight plan to the destination navaid and descend for the approach.
